directive: Do not execute scripts/db_migration.sh from the repository root; run it only after changing into the intended sample or target database directory so generated alembic.ini and alembic/ files are scoped there.
rationale: The migration script creates and edits Alembic files in its current working directory and applies database migrations. Running it at the repo root can leave generated migration artifacts in the project root and bind %(here)s to the wrong directory.

source_evidence.summary: The script is for updating old session databases, accepts the database URL and model import path, checks for alembic.ini/alembic in the current directory, initializes Alembic, and edits generated Alembic files.
The sample documents the migration use case, says the script generates and applies migrations, notes it creates alembic.ini and alembic/, and explains %(here)s refers to the current directory.
